title: AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Technician, Research Associate and More Posts
organization: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
post_name: Project Scientist –III, Research Associate –I, Research Associate –I, Technician
short_info: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) has officially announced the Project Scientist –III, Research Associate –I, Research Associate –I, Technician Recruitment 2026 with 4 openings. The detailed notification was published at the official website of AIIMS Delhi. Candidates who meet the age criteria mentioned in the official notification and hold qualifications such as Doctoral Degree in Science, Master’s in Engineering/Technology with research experience, PhD in Life Sciences, or BSc / Diploma in Engineering & Technology can submit their applications through email up to 31

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Doctoral Degree in Science or Master's in Engineering/Technology with 6 years research experience, PhD in life sciences, BSc or 3 years Diploma in Engineering & Technology
qualification.details: Project Scientist –III: Doctoral Degree in Science OR Master's Degree in Engineering or Technology from a recognized university with Six year research experience. Research Associate –I: PhD degree in life sciences with desirable experience in proteomics. Research Associate –I: PhD degree in life sciences with desirable experience in genomics including NGS. Technician: BSc / 3 years Diploma in Engineering & Technology.

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Delhi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the AIIMS Delhi recruitment is 31st May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Scientist –III posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced for various posts, including Project Scientist –III, Research Associate –I, and Technician.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is via email. Candidates need to send their applications to the designated email address.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What are the minimum qualifications required for Project Scientist –III?
faq.answer: For the Project Scientist –III position, candidates need a Doctoral Degree in Science or a Master's Degree in Engineering or Technology with six years of research experience.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions are contractual in nature.

faq.question: Q7. Where is AIIMS Delhi located?
faq.answer: AIIMS Delhi is located in New Delhi, Delhi.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is BT-2243.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q10. Can I apply offline for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, the application mode is strictly via email as specified in the official notification.
